Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cradle]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Cradle is the birthplace of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Cradle is the name Suriel's organization uses for the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel's organization considers Cradle to be where they keep infants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Cradle is an important world.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel requested information on Wei Shi Lindon from Cradle.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel cannot sense Cradle from Oversight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Cradle is an Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Cradle is the central planet of the world and is Iteration 110.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel has influence on the fate of Cradle.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Northstrider can be carried back into Cradle.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dread War was the greatest slaughter of Monarchs since the creation of Cradle.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Letting the arrow sit in Cradle is considered a disruption of balance.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Cradle is a location where Monarchs can cause problems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Cradle may experience minor corruption due to battles outside its world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Cradle is considered one of the core worlds by Suriel's organization.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 1''' — Ozmanthus Arelius has work to finish in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Cradle is an Iteration that shines like a star but is obscured by Vroshir influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Mad King intended to destroy Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Cradle is Ozriel's homeworld.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Cradle is a planet protected by Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Suriel states that Cradle is still in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon cannot unmake stars while stuck in Cradle.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel raised children in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Cradle is a location mentioned in comparison to the current world's situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Cradle is a place where Monarchs and Dreadgods exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Some Akura clan members are in the heavens, while others remain in Cradle.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen wants the Dreadgods out of Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Akura Malice would burn all of Cradle to the ground rather than surrender.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Dross mentions Monarchs on Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin and her group are the last people to ascend from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Cradle no longer has a stable enough connection to pull Lindon out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Larian wanted to preserve pieces of Cradle's history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth once thought he would rule Cradle like a king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The protection of Cradle was arranged by two Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Lindon was nervous about leaving Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Cradle is a place that can be visited.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider sensed his surroundings as he had on Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Cradle is a huge world with a population in the hundreds of billions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan's Presence has recently gained memories from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Cradle is a location or world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The report takes place during Iteration 110: Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon felt the sensation of being back in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan suggests that fighting the Court of Seven would destroy Cradle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
